title: anthoshorea stipularis
intro: Anthoshorea stipularis, also known as the Stipule-bearing Anthoshorea, is a type of plant species that belongs to the family of flowering plants. The medicinal properties of Anthoshorea stipularis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Anthoshorea stipularis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
